sourcesContent: var o={background:"{content.background}",borderRadius:"{border.radius.xl}",color:"{content.color}",shadow:"0 1px 3px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 1px 2px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)"},r={padding:"1.25rem",gap:"0.5rem"},t={gap:"0.5rem"},e={fontSize:"1.25rem",fontWeight:"500"},a={color:"{text.muted.color}"},d={root:o,body:r,caption:t,title:e,subtitle:a};export{r as body,t as caption,d as default,o as root,a as subtitle,e as title};
